title: Those Who Have Lamented and Elegized 'Umar-Some of the Elegies Written about Him
description: Those Who Have Lamented and Elegized 'Umar-Some of the Elegies Written about Him. Recorded under the year 22 AH (643–644 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 14.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 14
